posts.author: VishalJain
posts.text: Why zerodha is not launching its NASDAQ ETF or mutual fund? — Hi. there is a $8 billion limit that for MFs to invest internationally which is full. Till the time this limit opens, its difficult to launch new schemes.

posts.author: Passionate_trader
posts.text: Why zerodha is not launching its NASDAQ ETF or mutual fund? — Why only few companies has nasdaq offerings in india like mirae or motilal? @VishalJain
